# 🌅 Morning Digest — Tuesday, May 26, 2026

## 📬 Emails Needing Attention
⚠️ **Microsoft 365 connector unavailable** — The Outlook email tool requires re-authentication and could not run in this automated session. Please reconnect the MS365 plugin in Cowork settings to restore email monitoring.

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations
⚠️ **Microsoft Teams connector unavailable** — Same authentication issue as above. Teams message monitoring is currently offline.

## 📅 Today's Agenda
⚠️ **Calendar data unavailable** — Outlook Calendar could not be queried this run. Check your calendar directly for today's meetings.

## ⚡ Immediate Action
**Action required:** The Microsoft 365 connector needs to be re-authenticated. Open Cowork, go to plugin settings, find the MS365 plugin, and complete the OAuth flow. Once done, tomorrow’s digest will resume normally.

---
*Note: This digest was generated without live data because the MS365 connector required interactive authentication, which cannot be completed during an automated run. All other pipeline steps (Supabase + GitHub Pages) are still executing.*
